input.headline: Gen Z are flocking to these unconventional jobs in order to earn big - and it's working

raw.headline: Gen Z are flocking to these unconventional jobs in order to earn big - and it's working

winner: Gen Z is so broke they’re turning their TikTok dance skills into a side hustle—performing for a single like, then charging $100 for that “one” in NFT form. It’s called “Likes to Cash.” The SEC just asked if this counts as securities fraud or just millennial rage.

candidates.text: Gen Z is so broke they’re turning their TikTok dance skills into a side hustle—performing for a single like, then charging $100 for that “one” in NFT form. It’s called “Likes to Cash.” The SEC just asked if this counts as securities fraud or just millennial rage.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on NFTs and TikTok, specific reference to SEC, concise and modern humor"}

candidates.text: Gen Z is quitting their jobs left and right—turns out, being a professional nap-taker pays way better than a 9-to-5.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on unconventional jobs, concise and specific with a clever play on 'nap-taker'"}

candidates.text: Gen Z’s new dream job is standing in line at IKEA during their sale weekend—it’s exhausting, but the paycheck comes with a lifetime supply of Allen wrenches.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific comparison of unconventional job to IKEA sale, with a clever twist on the paycheck benefit."}

candidates.text: Gen Z is turning 'side hustle' into a full-time job by selling 'hustle.' Their motto? 'Side gigs aren't my side—it's my whole ride.'
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative wordplay with 'hustle' and 'side gigs,' concise and specific to Gen Z trends."}

candidates.text: Gen Z is so broke they're selling their NFTs on blockchain—turns out, even digital art needs a side hustle.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant and has a mild twist, but it's generic and lacks the specificity and surprise needed for higher humor impact."}
